response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and two distinct songs were identified early on. The rest of the video is a medley of various Hololive songs. 'Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan☆' (Houshou Marine) and 'RIP' (Mori Calliope) were the first two identified. Due to the medley nature, the remainder is generalized. Search query used: "[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics".
response.global_summary: A crowd-focused highlight reel of a Hololive concert, featuring fans cheering and holding merchandise while a medley of various Hololive songs plays in the background.

scenes.description: Crowd scenes and close-ups of fans with merchandise; 'Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan☆' is playing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
"海賊ならYo-Ho!!(Yo-Ho!)
踊れ叫べYo-Ho(Yo-Ho!)
さぁ今旗のもとへ
(Hi Hi Hi Hi)
宝鐘海賊団「出航〜!」
(Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy!)
踊るAhoy!に見るAhoy!(ホイホーイ)
(Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy! ホイホイホーイ)
「全速前進だ〜!」
進め!(進め!)
太陽はサンサン大航海日和だ
歌え!(歌え!)
最高のテンション波の音に乗せてドンブラコ"
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"If it's a pirate, Yo-Ho!! (Yo-Ho!)
Dance and shout Yo-Ho! (Yo-Ho!)
Now, under the flag
(Hi Hi Hi Hi)
Houshou Pirates 'Set sail~!'
(Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy!)
Dance Ahoy! Watch Ahoy! (Hoi-hoi!)
(Ahoy! Ahoy! Ahoy! Hoi-hoi-hoi!)
'Full speed ahead~!'
Advance! (Advance!)
The sun is shining, a perfect day for a grand voyage
Sing! (Sing!)
Riding the waves with the best tension, donburako"
